title: Test Input Brief Feature
author: AI Requirement Agent
problem_statement: Users face delays in configuring experiments due to manual KPI validation and lack of sample size preview.
business_value: Reducing setup time improves PM productivity and increases experiment throughput, leading to faster insights and potential revenue uplift.

functional_requirements.requirement: User can create a new experiment from the dashboard.
System validates KPI selection against data source.
User can preview estimated sample size.

user_stories.title: Create a new experiment
user_stories.i_want_to: start a new experiment from the My Experiments dashboard
user_stories.so_that: I can run an A/B test without involving the Data Science team

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All mandatory fields validated before save
Experiment appears in My Experiments list

user_stories.title: Validate KPI selection
user_stories.i_want_to: ensure KPI is valid and has data before proceeding
user_stories.so_that: I avoid wasted experiments with incorrect KPIs

acceptance_criteria.criterion: System checks KPI against Snowflake data
User can re-select KPI without restarting wizard

user_stories.title: Preview sample size
user_stories.i_want_to: see estimated sample size before launching experiment
user_stories.so_that: I can adjust parameters to meet statistical significance

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Sample size displayed after KPI validation
Fallback estimate shown if query times out

edge_cases.expected_behaviour: Show error and allow KPI re-selection.

risks.mitigation: Add query timeout + fallback cached estimate.

open_questions: Should experiment drafts auto-expire after 30 days?
